_comment: DAIL-SQL few-shot bank for SQL Specialist. Copyright 2026 Amazon.
_contract: 이 뱅크의 질문은 tests/golden/ 의 평가 질문과 의도적으로 겹치지 않는다(train/test 오염 방지). 같은 ground-truth 스키마(db/init/02_create_tables.sql)와 idiom(KST AT TIME ZONE, usage.usage_logs.requested_at/model_alias/status enum, virtual_keys.status, budget_configs.max_budget_usd/policy)을 가르치되 표현·조합은 다르다. fewshot.py 가 키워드 유사도로 top-k 를 골라 주입하며, golden 질문과 정규화 일치하는 항목은 LOO 가드로 제외한다(이중 방어).

examples.question: 오늘 모델별 호출 수
examples.sql:
SELECT l.model_alias, COUNT(*) AS calls
FROM usage.usage_logs l
WHERE (l.requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date = (now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date
GROUP BY l.model_alias
ORDER BY calls DESC
examples.teaches: 오늘=KST date 비교, model_alias(NOT model), COUNT 집계

examples.question: 지난 7일 가장 비싼 모델 top 5
examples.sql:
SELECT l.model_alias, SUM(l.cost_usd) AS cost_usd
FROM usage.usage_logs l
WHERE l.requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') - interval '7 days'
  AND l.requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' < date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')
GROUP BY l.model_alias
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC
LIMIT 5
examples.teaches: 지난 N일=KST 날짜경계로 잘라 오늘(진행중) 제외 — 롤링윈도우도 양변을 AT TIME ZONE Asia/Seoul로 앵커(raw now()-interval 금지), SUM(cost_usd) 랭킹

examples.question: 팀별 이번 달 평균 응답 지연시간
examples.sql:
SELECT t.name AS team, AVG(l.latency_ms) AS avg_latency_ms
FROM usage.usage_logs l
LEFT JOIN auth.teams t ON t.id = l.team_id
WHERE l.requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' >= date_trunc('month', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')
GROUP BY t.name
ORDER BY avg_latency_ms DESC
examples.teaches: AVG(NOT SUM), latency_ms, 팀 귀속은 usage_logs.team_id 직접 사용(호출 시점 팀 보존 — users.team_id 경유 금지: 팀 이동 사용자 오귀속·default팀 누락 방지), 이번달=date_trunc month KST

examples.question: 최근 14일 일별 에러율
examples.sql:
SELECT (requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date AS day,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('ERROR','TIMEOUT')) AS errors,
       COUNT(*) AS total,
       ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('ERROR','TIMEOUT')) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS error_rate_pct
FROM usage.usage_logs
WHERE requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') - interval '14 days'
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day
examples.teaches: status enum(ERROR/TIMEOUT, NOT status_code), FILTER 비율, NULLIF 0나눗셈 방지, 롤링윈도우도 KST 날짜경계로 앵커(raw now()-interval 금지)

examples.question: 폐기된 VK 가 가장 많은 사용자
examples.sql:
SELECT u.email, COUNT(*) AS revoked_keys
FROM auth.virtual_keys k
JOIN auth.users u ON u.id = k.user_id
WHERE k.status = 'REVOKED'
GROUP BY u.email
ORDER BY revoked_keys DESC
LIMIT 20
examples.teaches: virtual_keys.status enum(REVOKED, NOT is_active), VK→user JOIN, COUNT 랭킹

examples.question: 이번 주 캐시 적중 토큰이 가장 많은 사용자
examples.sql:
SELECT u.email, SUM(l.cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read_tokens
FROM usage.usage_logs l
JOIN auth.users u ON u.id = l.user_id
WHERE l.requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' >= date_trunc('week', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')
GROUP BY u.email
ORDER BY cache_read_tokens DESC
LIMIT 10
examples.teaches: cache_read_tokens, 이번주=date_trunc week KST, SUM 랭킹

examples.question: HARD_BLOCK 정책을 쓰는 팀 예산 목록
examples.sql:
SELECT t.name AS team, b.max_budget_usd, b.period_type
FROM budget.budget_configs b
JOIN auth.teams t ON t.id = b.scope_id
WHERE b.scope = 'TEAM' AND b.policy = 'HARD_BLOCK' AND b.is_active = true
ORDER BY b.max_budget_usd DESC
examples.teaches: budget_configs.policy enum(HARD_BLOCK), scope='TEAM', scope_id→teams.id, max_budget_usd(used_usd 없음)

examples.question: 발급됐지만 한 번도 사용 안 된 활성 VK
examples.sql:
SELECT u.email, k.key_prefix, k.issued_at
FROM auth.virtual_keys k
JOIN auth.users u ON u.id = k.user_id
WHERE k.status = 'ACTIVE' AND k.last_used_at IS NULL
ORDER BY k.issued_at DESC
examples.teaches: virtual_keys.last_used_at IS NULL(미사용 판정), status='ACTIVE' 동시 조건

examples.question: 사용자별 비용·토큰 사용 패턴을 군집화해줘
examples.sql:
SELECT user_id,
       SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost,
       SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS total_tokens,
       COUNT(*) AS calls
FROM usage.usage_logs
WHERE requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY user_id
examples.code_hint: sklearn StandardScaler 후 KMeans 로 사용자 군집화 (n_clusters 3~4, random_state=42)
examples.teaches: 사용자 단위 집계 SQL, 롤링윈도우 KST 앵커, Tier B clustering(KMeans) 위임, input_tokens+output_tokens

examples.question: 최근 60일 일별 호출량의 7일 이동평균 추세
examples.sql:
SELECT (requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date AS d,
       COUNT(*) AS calls
FROM usage.usage_logs
WHERE requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') - interval '60 days'
GROUP BY d
ORDER BY d
examples.code_hint: pandas rolling(window=7).mean() 으로 이동평균 — line 차트(원본 + MA)
examples.teaches: 일별 시계열 SQL(롤링윈도우 KST 앵커), Tier B moving-average(rolling) 위임

examples.question: 요일별 평균 비용 패턴 분석
examples.sql:
SELECT (requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::date AS d,
       SUM(cost_usd) AS daily_cost
FROM usage.usage_logs
WHERE requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') - interval '90 days'
GROUP BY d
ORDER BY d
examples.code_hint: pandas: d 를 datetime 변환 후 dt.dayofweek groupby 평균 — 요일별 bar
examples.teaches: 일별 cost SQL(90일, 롤링윈도우 KST 앵커), Tier B 요일 집계(pandas dayofweek)

examples.question: 모델별 비용 대비 토큰 효율 산점도
examples.sql:
SELECT model_alias,
       SUM(cost_usd) AS cost_usd,
       SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS tokens
FROM usage.usage_logs
WHERE requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' >= date_trunc('day', now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul') - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY model_alias
examples.code_hint: matplotlib scatter (x=tokens, y=cost_usd, model_alias 라벨) → PNG → S3 업로드
examples.teaches: 모델 단위 집계(롤링윈도우 KST 앵커), Tier B scatter PNG 위임(heatmap 과 다른 시각화)

examples.question: 이번 달 앱별(claude code vs codex vs cowork) 비용 비교
examples.sql:
SELECT COALESCE(l.client, 'other') AS client,
       SUM(l.cost_usd) AS cost_usd,
       COUNT(*) AS calls
FROM usage.usage_logs l
WHERE to_char(l.requested_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM') = to_char(now() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM')
  AND l.status = 'SUCCESS'
GROUP BY COALESCE(l.client, 'other')
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC
examples.teaches: 앱별 분석=client 컬럼 GROUP BY (claude-code/cowork/codex), NULL→'other' COALESCE, 비용집계는 status='SUCCESS'+KST 월. '코덱스 사용량'·'앱별 비교'류 질문의 정답 패턴
